title.ko: 전동장치(Gearing)
title.en: GEARING

definition.ko: 회전 운동에 제한되지 않는 전동장치 전동장치 레버, 링크 또는 캠 사용 F16H21/00 ~ F16H25/00 간헐 구동 부재를 사용하는 것 F16H27/00 ~ F16H31/00 다른 기어; 기어의 결합 F16H19/00, F16H33/00, F16H35/00; F16H37/00 세부 F16H51/00 ~ F16H57/00 유체 전동장치 F16H43/00 회전 운동 전달용 전동장치 톱니 기어 F16H1/00, F16H3/00 무한 가요성 부재 F16H7/00, F16H9/00 기타 마찰 기어 F16H13/00, F16H15/00 유체 기어 F16H39/00, F16H41/00, F16H45/00 간헐 구동 부재를 이용하는 것 F16H29/00 제어 회전 움직임을 전달하는 속도 변화 또는 역 회전 기어 작동 F16H59/00 ~ F16H63/00 기어 조합; 차동 기어; 기타 기어 F16H47/00; F16H48/00; F16H49/00 전동장치의 일반 세부 F16H57/00

title.ko: 회전운동전달용 치차전동장치(가변속도비를 갖는 회전운동의 전달 또는 역전운동에 특유한 것 3/00)
title.en: Toothed gearings for conveying rotary motion

title.ko: 회전운동전달용 치차전동장치(가변속도비를 갖는 회전운동의 전달 또는 역전운동에 특유한 것 3/00)
title.en: Toothed gearings for conveying rotary motion (specific for conveying rotary motion with variable gear ratio or for reversing rotary motion F16H0003000000)

title.ko: 유성운동(orbital motion)을 하는 치차가 없는 것
title.en: without gears having orbital motion

title.ko: 단지 2개의 서로 물리는 부재를 포함하는 것
title.en: involving only two intermeshing members
with parallel axes
the members having helical, herring-bone, or like teeth
one of the members being internally toothed

title.ko: 평행하지 않은 축을 갖는 것
title.en: with non-parallel axes
comprising conical gears only
comprising worm and worm-wheel

title.ko: 부재가 헬리컬, 이중헬리컬 또는 이것과 동일한 치를 가지고 있는 것(F16H 1/14이 우선)
title.en: the members having helical, herring-bone, or like teeth (F16H0001140000 takes precedence)
involving more than two intermeshing members
with a plurality of driving or driven shafts; with arrangements for dividing torque between two or more intermediate shafts

title.ko: 인볼류트 또는 사이클로이드와 이와는 다른 서로 물리는 요소를 본질적으로 가지고 있는 치차를 포함하는 것 (F16H 1/16이 우선)
title.en: involving gears essentially having intermeshing elements other than involute or cycloidal teeth (F16H0001160000 takes precedence)
Special means compensating for misalignment of axes

title.ko: 유성운동(orbital motion)을 하는 치차가 있는 것
title.en: with gears having orbital motion
in which an orbital gear has an axis crossing the main axis of the gearing and has helical teeth or is a worm
in which the central axis of the gearing lies inside the periphery of an orbital gear

title.ko: 인볼류트 또는 사이클로이드 이와는 다른 서로 물리는 요소를 본질적으로 가지고 있는 치차를 포함한 것(웜전동장치 (F16H 1/30)
title.en: involving gears essentially having intermeshing elements other than involute or cycloidal teeth (in worm gearing F16H0001300000)
with two central gears coupled by intermeshing orbital gears
Systems consisting of a plurality of gear trains, each with orbital gears
Special means compensating for misalignment of axes

title.ko: 가변속도비를 가진 회전운동 전달용 또는 역전용 치차장치(변속기구 또는 역전기구 (F16H 59/00-F16H 63/00)
title.en: Toothed gearings for conveying rotary motion with variable gear ratio or for reversing rotary motion (speed-changing or reversing mechanisms F16H0059000000-F16H0063000000)

title.ko: 유성운동을 하는 치차가 없는 것
title.en: without gears having orbital motion
with internally-toothed gears
with worm and worm-wheel or gears essentially having helical or herring-bone teeth

title.ko: 모두 또는 본질적으로 축으로부터 떼어낼 수 있으며 항상 물리고 있는 치차를 갖는 것
title.en: exclusively or essentially with continuously- meshing gears, that can be disengaged from their shafts

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 이가 맞물릴 수 없는 치차가 역전에만 사용되는 경우에는 고려하지 않음

title.en: with radially acting and axially controlled clutching members, e.g. sliding keys
with more than one output shaft

title.ko: 치차의 배치에 특징이 있는 것((F16H 3/083, (F16H 3/085가 우선)
title.en: characterised by the disposition of the gears (F16H0003083000, F16H0003085000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 카운터축(COUNTER SHAFT)을 고려하는 경우에 역전용 카운터축은 그것이 역전동에만 사용되는 경우에는 계산하지 않는다.

title.en: all of the meshing gears being supported by a pair of parallel shafts, one being the input shaft and the other the output shaft, there being no countershaft involved
including a single countershaft
with two or more countershafts
with means for ensuring an even distribution of torque between the countershafts
the input and output shafts being aligned on the same axis
with one or more one-way clutches as an essential feature
with means for synchronisation not incorporated in the clutches
Gearings for reversal only
essentially with both gears that can be put out of gear and continuously-meshing gears that can be disengaged from their shafts
Gearings for reversal only
exclusively or essentially using gears that can be moved out of gear
with gears shiftable only axially
with driving and driven shafts coaxial
and two or more additional shafts
an additional shaft being coaxial with the main shafts
with driving and driven shafts not coaxial
and an additional shaft
with gears shiftable otherwise than only axially
with a single gear meshable with any of a set of coaxial gears of different diameters
with synchro-meshing
Gearings for reversal only
with gears having teeth formed or arranged for obtaining multiple gear ratios, e.g. nearly infinitely variable

title.ko: 유성운동을 하는 치차가 있는 것
title.en: using gears having orbital motion

title.ko: 유성치차에 의하여 연결된 단지 2개의 중심치차를 가지고 있는 전동장치(3/68 ~ 3/78이 우선)
title.en: Gearings having only two central gears, connected by orbital gears (F16H0003680000-F16H0003780000 take precedence)
with single orbital gears or pairs of rigidly-connected orbital gears
comprising orbital conical gears
comprising orbital spur gears
one of the central gears being internally toothed and the other externally toothed
both central gears being sun gears
with sets of orbital gears, each consisting of two or more intermeshing orbital gears
Gearings for reversal only

title.ko: 3개 이상의 중심치차를 갖는 전동장치(F16H 3/68 ～ F16H 3/78이 우선)
title.en: Gearings having three or more central gears (F16H0003680000-F16H0003780000 take precedence)
composed of a number of gear trains, the drive always passing through all the trains, each train having not more than one connection for driving another train
composed of a number of gear trains without drive passing from one train to another
in which an orbital gear has an axis crossing the main axis of the gearing and has helical teeth or is a worm
in which the central axis of the gearing lies inside the periphery of an orbital gear
with a secondary drive, e.g. regulating motor, in order to vary speed continuously
Complexes, not using actuatable speed-changing or regulating members, e.g. with gear ratio determined by free play of frictional or other forces
with an orbital gear having teeth formed or arranged for obtaining multiple gear ratios, e.g. nearly infinitely variable
Special adaptation of synchronisation mechanisms to these gearings

title.ko: 무한 가요성부재(endless flexible member)에 의한 회전운동전달장치(가변변속비를 갖는 회전운동기구 또는 역전기구에 특유한 것 F16H 9/00)
title.en: Gearing for conveying rotary motion by endless flexible members

title.ko: 무한 가요성부재(endless flexible member)에 의한 회전운동전달장치(가변변속비를 갖는 회전운동기구 또는 역전기구에 특유한 것 F16H 9/00)
title.en: Gearings for conveying rotary motion by endless flexible members (specific for conveying rotary motion with variable gear ratio or for reversing rotary motion F16H0009000000)
with belts; with V-belts
with ropes
with chains

title.ko: 벨트, 로프 또는 체인의 장력변경수단(조정가능 구조의 풀리 F16H 55/52)
title.en: Means for varying tension of belts, ropes, or chains (pulleys of adjustable construction F16H0055520000)
by adjusting the axis of a pulley
of an idle pulley
of a driving or driven pulley
without adjusting the driving or driven shaft

title.ko: 벨트, 로프 또는 체인의 안내 또한 지지수단(풀리의 구조 F16H 55/36)
title.en: Means for guiding or supporting belts, ropes, or chains (construction of pulleys F16H0055360000)
Mountings for rollers or pulleys
Belt, rope, or chain shifters
Equipment for mounting belts, ropes, or chains

title.ko: 가변 기어비로 회전 운동을 전달하거나 회전 운동을 역전시키기위한 기어링, 무한 유연 부재(회전 운동을 전달하는 변경 속도 또는 리버스 기어링 제어 F16H59/00~F16H63/00)
title.en: Gearings for conveying rotary motion with variable gear ratio, or for reversing rotary motion, by endless flexible members (control of change-speed or reversing-gearings conveying rotary motion F16H0059000000-F16H0063000000)

title.ko: 유성운동을 하는 부재가 없는 것
title.en: without members having orbital motion

title.ko: 벨트, V 벨트 또는 로프를 사용하는 것(이가 있는 벨트 9/24; 조정할 수 있는 구조의 풀리 F16H 55/24)
title.en: using belts, V-belts, or ropes (with toothed belts F16H0009240000;pulleys of adjustable construction F16H0055520000)
engaging a stepped pulley

title.ko: 원추형드럼과 계합(engaging)하는 것(F16H 9/12이 우선)
title.en: engaging a conical drum (F16H0009120000 takes precedence)
engaging a pulley provided with radially-actuatable elements carrying the belt
engaging a pulley built-up out of relatively axially-adjustable parts in which the belt engages the opposite flanges of the pulley directly without interposed belt-supporting members
using only one pulley built-up out of adjustable conical parts
using two pulleys, both built-up out of adjustable conical parts
only one flange of each pulley being adjustable
both flanges of the pulleys being adjustable
specially adapted for ropes
using chains, toothed belts, belts in the form of links; Chains or belts specially adapted to such gearing
with members having orbital motion

title.ko: 회전부재사이의 마찰에 의한 일정변속비를 갖는 회전운동전동용 전동장치
title.en: Other friction gearing for conveying rotary motion

title.ko: 회전부재사이의 마찰에 의한 일정변속비를 갖는 회전운동전동용 전동장치
title.en: Gearing for conveying rotary motion with constant gear ratio by friction between rotary members
without members having orbital motion
with balls or with rollers acting in a similar manner
with members having orbital motion
with balls or with rollers acting in a similar manner
Means for influencing the pressure between the members
by magnetic forces
for automatically varying the pressure mechanically

title.ko: 회전부재사이의 마찰에 의한 가변변속비를 가진 회전운동전달용 또는 역전용 전동장치(변속 또는 역전기구 F16H 17/00)
title.en: Gearings for conveying rotary motion with variable gear ratio, or for reversing rotary motion, by friction between rotary members (control of change-speed or reversing-gearings conveying rotary motion F16H0059000000-F16H0063000000)
characterised by the use of a magnetisable powder or liquid as friction medium between the rotary members

title.ko: 유성운동을 하는 부재가 없는 것
title.en: without members having orbital motion

title.ko: 연속적인 변속비를 갖는 전동장치
title.en: Gearings providing a continuous range of gear ratios

title.ko: 일정한 유효지름의 축에 부착된 부재 A가 부재 B의 다른 부분과 함께 움직이는 것
title.en: in which a member A of uniform effective diameter mounted on a shaft may co-operate with different parts of a member B

title.ko: 부재 B가 평탄한 또는 평탄에 가까운 마찰면을 갖는 것
title.en: in which the member B is a disc with a flat or approximately-flat friction surface
in which the axes of the two members cross or intersect
in which one or each member is duplicated, e.g. for obtaining better transmission, for lessening the reaction forces on the bearings
in which the axes of the members are parallel or approximately parallel

title.ko: 부재 B가 원뿔 모양의 마찰면을 갖는 것
title.en: in which the member B has a conical friction surface

title.ko: 바깥쪽에 마찰면을 갖는 것
title.en: externally

title.ko: 부재 B의 마찰면에 수직 또는 수직에 가까운 상태인 부재A의 바깥쪽 림과 함께 움직이는 것
title.en: co-operating with the outer rim of the member A, which is perpendicular or nearly perpendicular to the friction surface of the member B
the axes of the members being parallel or approximately parallel
internally

title.ko: 부재 B가 회전축선을 중심으로 하는 구상마찰면을 갖는 것
title.en: in which the member B has a spherical friction surface centered on its axis of revolution
with external friction surface
with internal friction surface

title.ko: 부재 B의 마찰면이 회전축선을 중심으로 하는 원호 및 직선이외의 곡선의 회전체의 표면으로서 형성되는 것
title.en: in which the member B has a curved friction surface formed as a surface of a body of revolution generated by a curve which is neither a circular arc centered on its axis of revolution nor a straight line
with convex friction surface

title.ko: 오목형의 마찰면을 갖는 것, 예. 오목형의 트로이드(toroid) 면
title.en: with concave friction surface, e.g. a hollow toroid surface

title.ko: 2개의 부재 B에 맞서는 오목형 트로이드 면사이에 부재 또는 부재 A를 조정할 수 있게 설치한 것
title.en: with two members B having hollow toroid surfaces opposite to each other, the member or members A being adjustably mounted between the surfaces
in which two members co-operate by means of balls, or rollers of uniform effective diameter, not mounted on shafts
in which two members co-operate by means of rings or by means of parts of endless flexible members pressed between the first-mentioned members
in which two members of non-uniform effective diameter directly co-operate with one another
Gearings providing a discontinuous or stepped range of gear ratios
with members having orbital motion
Gearings providing a continuous range of gear ratios
in which a member of uniform effective diameter mounted on a shaft may co-operate with different parts of another member
in which two members co-operate by means of rings or by means of parts of endless flexible members pressed between the first-mentioned members
Gearings providing a discontinuous or stepped range of gear ratios

title.ko: 본질적으로 치차 또는 마찰부재만으로 구성되어 있고, 무한히 계속되는 회전운동을 전달할 수 없는 전동장치 (간헐 구동부재를 사용한 것 F16H 27/00 - F16H 31/00)
title.en: Gearings comprising essentially only toothed gears or friction members and not capable of conveying indefinitely-continuing rotary motion (with intermittently-driving members F16H0027000000-F16H0031000000)
for interconverting rotary motion and reciprocating motion
comprising a rack
comprising an endless flexible member
for interconverting rotary motion and oscillating motion

title.ko: 주로 링크 또는 레버만으로 구성되어 있고 미끄럼부를 갖거나 또는 갖지 않는 전동장치
title.en: Gearing for conveying or converting motion by means of levers, links, cams or screw-and-nut mechanisms

title.ko: 주로 링크 또는 레버만으로 구성되어 있고 미끄럼부를 갖거나 또는 갖지 않는 전동장치
title.en: Gearings comprising primarily only links or levers, with or without slides (F16H0023000000 takes precedence)
the movements of two or more independently-moving members being combined into a single movement
Guiding mechanisms, e.g. for straight-line guidance
which can be made ineffective when desired
by pushing a reciprocating rod out of its operative position
all movement being in, or parallel to, a single plane
for conveying rotary motion
by means of cranks, eccentrics, or like members fixed to one rotary member and guided along tracks on the other
for interconverting rotary motion and reciprocating motion
Crank gearings; Eccentric gearings
with adjustment of throw
with one connecting-rod and one guided slide to each crank or eccentric
without further links or guides
with toggle action
with cams or additional guides
with members having rolling contact
with additional members comprising only pivoted links or arms
with two or more connecting-rods to each crank or eccentric
without swinging connecting-rod, e.g. with epicyclic parallel motion, slot-and- crank motion
with means for temporary energy accumulation, e.g. to overcome dead-centre positions
for interconverting rotary motion and oscillating motion
with adjustable throw
for conveying or interconverting oscillating or reciprocating motions
with movements in three dimensions [3D]
for conveying rotary motion
for interconverting rotary motion and reciprocating motion
for interconverting rotary motion and oscillating motion
for conveying or interconverting oscillating or reciprocating motions

title.ko: 요동판 전동장치(wobble-plate gearing) 경사크랭크 전동장치(oblique-crank gearing)
title.en: Wobble-plate gearings; Oblique-crank gearings

title.ko: 요동부재의 위치의 변경에 의하여 행정을 조정하는 것 (흔들리는 판의 조정으로 변속비율이 변경되는 기어 F16H 29/04; 자이로스코프 동작이 있는 기어, 예. 동요판을 포함하는 것 F16H 33/10)
title.en: with adjustment of throw by changing the position of the wobble-member  (gearings in which the transmission ratio is changed by adjustment of a wobble-plate F16H0029040000;gearings with gyroscopic action, e.g. comprising wobble-plates F16H0033100000)
with non-rotary wobble-members
with sliding members hinged to reciprocating members
connected to reciprocating members by connecting-rods
with rotary wobble-plates with plane surfaces

title.ko: 주로 캠, 캠종동체 및 나사-너트에 의한 기구만으로 되어 있는 전동장치
title.en: Gearings comprising primarily only cams, cam-followers and screw-and-nut mechanisms
the movements of two or more independently-moving members being combined into a single movement
for conveying rotary motion
with intermediate members guided along tracks on both rotary members

title.ko: 회전운동과 왕복운동의 상호 변환용(F16H 23/00이 우선)
title.en: for interconverting rotary motion and reciprocating motion (F16H0023000000 takes precedence)
with adjustable throw
with reciprocation along the axis of rotation, e.g. gearings with helical grooves and automatic reversal

title.ko: 회전축에 수직으로 왕복운동하는 것(스윙 연결로드가없는 크랭크 또는 편심 기어링 F16H21/36)
title.en: with reciprocation perpendicular to the axis of rotation  (crank or eccentric gearings without swinging connecting-rod F16H0021360000)
for interconverting rotary motion and oscillating motion

title.ko: 진동 또는 왕복운동을 전달하거나 상호변환을 하는 것
title.en: for conveying or interconverting oscillating or reciprocating motions

title.ko: 나사기구(자동반전하는 것 F16H 25/12)
title.en: Screw mechanisms (with automatic reversal F16H0025120000)
with balls, rollers, or similar members between the co-operating parts; Elements essential to the use of such members

title.ko: 이러한 기구에 본질적인 요소, 예. 나사, 너트(F16H 25/22이 우선)
title.en: Elements essential to such mechanisms, e.g. screws, nuts (F16H0025220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 프리휠 부재를 갖지 않는 순차기구(step-by-step mechanism), 예. 제네바 구동장치(Geneva drive)
title.en: Gearings with intermittently-driving members

title.ko: 프리휠 부재를 갖지 않는 순차기구(step-by-step mechanism), 예. 제네바 구동장치(Geneva drive)
title.en: Step-by-step mechanisms without freewheel members, e.g. Geneva drives
with at least one reciprocating or oscillating transmission member

title.ko: 연속회전을 순차 회전운동(step-by-step rotary movement)으로 변환하는 것
title.en: for converting continuous rotation into a step-by-step rotary movement
Mechanisms with driving pins in driven slots, e.g. Geneva drives
with driving toothed gears with interrupted toothing

title.ko: 이탈식의 전동부재에 의하여 얻어지며, 그룹 F16H 27/06 또는 F16H 27/08의 기구와 조합되거나 또는 조합되지 않는 것
title.en: obtained by means of disengageable transmission members, combined or not combined with mechanisms according to group F16H0027060000 or F16H0027080000

title.ko: 간헐구동부재를 갖는 회전운동 전달용 전동장치, 예. 프리휠 작용을 갖는 것
title.en: Gearings for conveying rotary motion with intermittently-driving members, e.g. with freewheel action

title.ko: 한쪽의 축과 진동 또는 왕복운동을 하는 중간부재 사이에 있으며 양쪽의 축과 함께 회전하지 않는 것(F16H 29/00, F16H 29/22이 우선)
title.en: between one of the shafts and an oscillating or reciprocating intermediate member, not rotating with either of the shafts (F16H0029200000, F16H0029220000 take precedence)
in which the transmission ratio is changed by adjustment of a crank, an eccentric, a wobble-plate, or a cam, on one of the shafts
with concentric shafts, an annular intermediate member moving around and being supported on an adjustable crank or eccentric
in which the transmission ratio is changed by adjustment of the path of movement, the location of the pivot, or the effective length, of an oscillating connecting member
